title: チャンピオンズCの後に・相剋な2人

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey delivers an impressive
performance backed by feng shui. But while
Hokko Tarumae recognizes her ability, it also
incites her anger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wanted to race a Copano Rickey wholly
devoted to racing, not distracted by feng shui.
Both racers are serious about their beliefs,
making it hard to understand each other.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey, too, wants a genuine competition
against Hokko Tarumae. Her desire for mutual
recognition prompts her to vow to have a
rematch at the February Stakes.
